title: koeleria phleoides
intro: Koeleria phleoides, also known as Koeler's hair-grass or June grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria phleoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or powder form to extract its medicinal properties.
